    local function id_record_ensure(p1, p2) --[[ id_record_ensure | Line: 843 | Upvalues: id_record_create (copy) ]]
    	local component_index = p1.component_index

    function t.Disconnect(p1) --[[ Disconnect | Line: 220 ]]
    	if p1.is_connected ~= false then
    		p1.is_connected = false
    		signal.listener_count = signal.listener_count - 1
    		if signal.head == p1 then
    			signal.head = p1.next
    			local head = signal.head
    			while head ~= nil and head.next ~= p1 do
    				head = head.next
    			if head ~= nil then
    				head.next = p1.next

    		is_connected = true,

    		signal = p1,
    		next = p1.head
    	}

    		end, { p1 })
    }

  use-debounce-callback (ModuleScript)
    Path: game.ReplicatedStorage.include.node_modules.@rbxts.pretty-react-hooks.out.use-debounce-callback.use-debounce-callback
    --- DECOMPILED CODE ---
    local v1 = _G[script]
    local useMemo = v1.import(script, v1.getModule(script, "@rbxts", "react")).useMemo
    local debounce = v1.import(script, v1.getModule(script, "@rbxts", "set-timeout").out).debounce
    local useLatest = v1.import(script, script.Parent.Parent, "use-latest").useLatest

    				return v1.current(unpack({ ... }))
    			end, p2.wait, p2)
    		end, {})
    		useUnmountEffect(function() --[[ Line: 34 | Upvalues: v2 (copy) ]]
    			v2.cancel()
    		end)
    		return {
    			run = v2,
    			cancel = v2.cancel,
    			flush = v2.flush,
    			pending = v2.pending
    		}
    }

    			v3(v5.current)
    		end, {})
    		useUnmountEffect(v4)
    		return v1, v6
    }

  math (ModuleScript)
    Path: game.ReplicatedStorage.include.node_modules.@rbxts.pretty-react-hooks.out.utils.math
    --- DECOMPILED CODE ---
    return {
    	lerp = function(p1, p2, p3) --[[ lerp | Line: 11 ]]
    		return p1 + (p2 - p1) * p3
    	map = function(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5) --[[ map | Line: 25 ]]
    		return (p1 - p2) * (p5 - p4) / (p3 - p2) + p4
    	blend = function(...) --[[ blend | Line: 37 ]]
    		for v2, v3 in { ... } do
    			v1 = v1 * (1 - v3)
    		return 1 - v1
    }
    --- END CODE ---

  src (ModuleScript)
    Path: game.ReplicatedStorage.include.node_modules.@rbxts.iris.src
    --- DECOMPILED CODE ---
    require(script.Types)
    local t = {}
    local v1 = require(script.Internal)(t)
    t.Disabled = false
    t.Args = {}
    t.Events = {}
    function t.Init(p1, p2) --[[ Init | Line: 70 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), t (copy) ]]
    	local v12 = if v1._started == false then true else false
    	assert(v12, "Iris.Init can only be called once.")
    	local v2 = if v1._shutdown == false then true else false
    	assert(v2, "Iris.Init cannot be called once shutdown.")
    		p1 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
    		p2 = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat
    	v1.parentInstance = p1
    	v1._started = true
    	v1._generateRootInstance()
    	v1._generateSelectionImageObject()
    	for v3, v4 in v1._initFunctions do
    		v4()
    	task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 93 | Upvalues: p2 (ref), v1 (ref) ]]
    		if typeof(p2) == "function" then
    			while v1._started do
    				p2()
    				v1._cycle()
    			v1._eventConnection = p2:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 100 | Upvalues: v1 (ref) ]]
    				v1._cycle()
    			end)
    	end)
    function t.Shutdown() --[[ Shutdown | Line: 114 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	v1._started = false
    	v1._shutdown = true
    	if v1._eventConnection then
    		v1._eventConnection:Disconnect()
    	v1._eventConnection = nil
    	if v1._rootWidget then
    		if v1._rootWidget.Instance then
    			v1._widgets.Root.Discard(v1._rootWidget)
    		v1._rootInstance = nil
    	if v1.SelectionImageObject then
    		v1.SelectionImageObject:Destroy()
    	for v12, v2 in v1._connections do
    		v2:Disconnect()
    function t.Connect(p1, p2) --[[ Connect | Line: 149 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	if v1._started == false then
    		warn("Iris:Connect() was called before calling Iris.Init(), the connected function will never run")
    	local v12 = #v1._connectedFunctions + 1
    	v1._connectedFunctions[v12] = p2
    	return function() --[[ Line: 155 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), v12 (copy) ]]
    		v1._connectedFunctions[v12] = nil
    function t.Append(p1) --[[ Append | Line: 169 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	local v12 = v1._GetParentWidget()
    	p1.Parent = v1._config.Parent or v1._widgets[v12.type].ChildAdded(v12, {
    		type = "userInstance"
    	})
    function t.End() --[[ End | Line: 206 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	if v1._stackIndex == 1 then
    		error("Callback has too many calls to Iris.End()", 2)
    	v1._IDStack[v1._stackIndex] = nil
    	v12._stackIndex = v12._stackIndex - 1
    function t.ForceRefresh() --[[ ForceRefresh | Line: 230 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	v1._globalRefreshRequested = true
    function t.UpdateGlobalConfig(p1) --[[ UpdateGlobalConfig | Line: 251 | Upvalues: v1 (copy), t (copy) ]]
    		v1._rootConfig[v12] = v2
    	t.ForceRefresh()
    function t.PushConfig(p1) --[[ PushConfig | Line: 275 | Upvalues: t (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
    	local v12 = t.State(-1)
    	if v12.value == -1 then
    		v12:set(p1)
    	elseif v1._deepCompare(v12:get(), p1) == false then
    		v1._localRefreshActive = true
    		v12:set(p1)
    	v1._config = setmetatable(p1, {
    		__index = v1._config
    	})
    function t.PopConfig() --[[ PopConfig | Line: 300 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	v1._localRefreshActive = false
    	v1._config = getmetatable(v1._config).__index
    t.TemplateConfig = require(script.config)
    t.UpdateGlobalConfig(t.TemplateConfig.colorDark)
    t.UpdateGlobalConfig(t.TemplateConfig.sizeDefault)
    t.UpdateGlobalConfig(t.TemplateConfig.utilityDefault)
    v1._globalRefreshRequested = false
    function t.PushId(p1) --[[ PushId | Line: 329 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	assert(typeof(p1) == "string", "Iris expected Iris.PushId id to PushId to be a string.")
    	v1._pushedId = tostring(p1)
    function t.PopId() --[[ PopId | Line: 340 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	v1._pushedId = nil
    function t.SetNextWidgetID(p1) --[[ SetNextWidgetID | Line: 365 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	v1._nextWidgetId = p1
    function t.State(p1) --[[ State | Line: 404 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	local v12 = v1._getID(2)
    	if not v1._states[v12] then
    		v1._states[v12] = {
    			ConnectedWidgets = {},
    			ConnectedFunctions = {}
    		}
    		setmetatable(v1._states[v12], v1.StateClass)
    	return v1._states[v12]
    function t.WeakState(p1) --[[ WeakState | Line: 425 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	local v12 = v1._getID(2)
    	if v1._states[v12] then
    		if next(v1._states[v12].ConnectedWidgets) == nil then
    			v1._states[v12] = nil
    			return v1._states[v12]
    	v1._states[v12] = {
    		ConnectedWidgets = {},
    		ConnectedFunctions = {}
    	}
    	setmetatable(v1._states[v12], v1.StateClass)
    	return v1._states[v12]
    function t.ComputedState(p1, p2) --[[ ComputedState | Line: 459 | Upvalues: v1 (copy) ]]
    	local v12 = v1._getID(2)
    	if not v1._states[v12] then
    		v1._states[v12] = {
    			value = p2(p1.value),
    			ConnectedWidgets = {},
    			ConnectedFunctions = {}
    		}
    		p1:onChange(function(p1) --[[ Line: 470 | Upvalues: v1 (ref), v12 (copy), p2 (copy) ]]
    			v1._states[v12]:set(p2(p1))
    		end)
    		local v2 = v1._states[v12]
    		local StateClass = v1.StateClass
    		setmetatable(v2, StateClass)
    	return v1._states[v12]
    t.ShowDemoWindow = require(script.demoWindow)(t)
    require(script.widgets)(v1)
    require(script.API)(t)
    --- END CODE ---

  Internal (ModuleScript)

    local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
    require(script.Parent.Types)
    return function(p1) --[[ Line: 5 | Upvalues: HttpService (copy) ]]
    	local t = {
    		_version = " 2.3.1 ",
    		_started = false,
    		_shutdown = false,
    		_cycleTick = 0,
    		_globalRefreshRequested = false,
    		_localRefreshActive = false,
    		_widgets = {},
    		_stackIndex = 1,
    		_rootInstance = nil
    	}
    	t._rootWidget = {
    		ID = "R",
    		type = "Root",
    		ZOffset = 0,
    		Instance = t._rootInstance
    	}
    	t._lastWidget = t._rootWidget
    	t._rootConfig = {}
    	t._config = t._rootConfig
    	t._IDStack = { "R" }
    	t._usedIDs = {}
    	t._pushedId = nil
    	t._nextWidgetId = nil
    	t._states = {}
    	t._postCycleCallbacks = {}
    	t._connectedFunctions = {}
    	t._connections = {}
    	t._initFunctions = {}
    	t._fullErrorTracebacks = game:GetService("RunService"):IsStudio()
    	t._cycleCoroutine = coroutine.create(function() --[[ Line: 71 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		while t._started do
    			for v1, v2 in t._connectedFunctions do
    				debug.profilebegin("Iris/Connection")
    				local v3, v4 = pcall(v2)
    				debug.profileend()
    					t._stackIndex = 1
    					coroutine.yield(false, v4)
    			coroutine.yield(true)
    	end)
    	local t2 = {}
    	function t2.get(p1) --[[ get | Line: 130 ]]
    	function t2.set(p1, p2) --[[ set | Line: 140 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		if p2 ~= p1.value then
    			for v1, v2 in p1.ConnectedWidgets do
    				t._widgets[v2.type].UpdateState(v2)
    			for v3, v4 in p1.ConnectedFunctions do
    				v4(p2)
    	function t2.onChange(p1, p2) --[[ onChange | Line: 161 ]]
    		local v1 = #p1.ConnectedFunctions + 1
    		p1.ConnectedFunctions[v1] = p2
    		return function() --[[ Line: 164 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), v1 (copy) ]]
    			p1.ConnectedFunctions[v1] = nil
    	t.StateClass = t2
    	function t._cycle() --[[ _cycle | Line: 183 | Upvalues: p1 (copy), t (copy) ]]
    		if not p1.Disabled then
    			t._rootWidget.lastCycleTick = t._cycleTick
    			if t._rootInstance == nil or t._rootInstance.Parent == nil then
    				p1.ForceRefresh()
    			for v1, v2 in t._lastVDOM do
    				if v2.lastCycleTick ~= t._cycleTick and v2.lastCycleTick ~= -1 then
    					t._DiscardWidget(v2)
    			local _lastVDOM = t._lastVDOM
    			setmetatable(_lastVDOM, {
    				__mode = "kv"
    			})
    			t._lastVDOM = t._VDOM
    			t._VDOM = t._generateEmptyVDOM()
    			task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 209 | Upvalues: t (ref) ]]
    				for v1, v2 in t._postCycleCallbacks do
    					v2()
    			end)
    			if t._globalRefreshRequested then
    				t._generateSelectionImageObject()
    				t._globalRefreshRequested = false
    				for v3, v4 in t._lastVDOM do
    					t._DiscardWidget(v4)
    				t._generateRootInstance()
    				t._lastVDOM = t._generateEmptyVDOM()
    			local v5 = t
    			v5._cycleTick = v5._cycleTick + 1
    			table.clear(t._usedIDs)
    			local v6 = t.parentInstance:IsA("GuiBase2d") or t.parentInstance:IsA("CoreGui") or t.parentInstance:IsA("PluginGui") or t.parentInstance:IsA("PlayerGui")
    			if v6 == false then
    				error("Iris Parent Instance cant contain GUI")
    			if t._fullErrorTracebacks then
    				for v7, v8 in t._connectedFunctions do
    					v8()
    				local v9 = coroutine.status(t._cycleCoroutine)
    				if v9 == "suspended" then
    					local _, v10, v11 = coroutine.resume(t._cycleCoroutine)
    					if v10 == false then
    						error(v11, 0)
    				elseif v9 == "running" then
    					error("Iris cycleCoroutine took to long to yield. Connected functions should not yield.")
    					error("unrecoverable state")
    			if t._stackIndex ~= 1 then
    				error("Callback has too few calls to Iris.End()", 0)
    	function t._NoOp() --[[ _NoOp | Line: 286 ]] end
    	function t.WidgetConstructor(p12, p2) --[[ WidgetConstructor | Line: 300 | Upvalues: t (copy), p1 (copy) ]]
    		local t2 = {
    			All = {
    				Required = { "Generate", "Discard", "Update", "Args", "Events", "hasChildren", "hasState" },
    				Optional = {}
    			},
    			IfState = {
    				Required = { "GenerateState", "UpdateState" },
    				Optional = {}
    			},
    			IfChildren = {
    				Required = { "ChildAdded" },
    				Optional = { "ChildDiscarded" }
    			}
    		}
    		local t3 = {}
    		for v1, v2 in t2.All.Required do
    			local v3 = if p2[v2] == nil then false else true
    			assert(v3, (("field %* is missing from widget %*, it is required for all widgets"):format(v2, p12)))
    			t3[v2] = p2[v2]
    		for v5, v6 in t2.All.Optional do
    			if p2[v6] == nil then
    				t3[v6] = t._NoOp
    			t3[v6] = p2[v6]
    		if p2.hasState then
    			for v7, v8 in t2.IfState.Required do
    				local v9 = if p2[v8] == nil then false else true
    				assert(v9, (("field %* is missing from widget %*, it is required for all widgets with state"):format(v8, p12)))
    				t3[v8] = p2[v8]
    			for v11, v12 in t2.IfState.Optional do
    				if p2[v12] == nil then
    					t3[v12] = t._NoOp
    				t3[v12] = p2[v12]
    		if p2.hasChildren then
    			for v13, v14 in t2.IfChildren.Required do
    				local v15 = if p2[v14] == nil then false else true
    				assert(v15, (("field %* is missing from widget %*, it is required for all widgets with children"):format(v14, p12)))
    				t3[v14] = p2[v14]
    			for v17, v18 in t2.IfChildren.Optional do
    				if p2[v18] == nil then
    					t3[v18] = t._NoOp
    				t3[v18] = p2[v18]
    		t._widgets[p12] = t3
    		p1.Args[p12] = t3.Args
    		local t4 = {}
    		for v19, v20 in t3.Args do
    			t4[v20] = v19
    		t3.ArgNames = t4
    		for v21, v22 in t3.Events do
    			if p1.Events[v21] == nil then
    				p1.Events[v21] = function() --[[ Line: 391 | Upvalues: t (ref), v21 (copy) ]]
    					return t._EventCall(t._lastWidget, v21)
    	function t._Insert(p1, p2, p3) --[[ _Insert | Line: 409 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		local v1 = t._getID(3)
    		local v2 = t._widgets[p1]
    		if t._VDOM[v1] then
    			return t._ContinueWidget(v1, p1)
    			local t2 = {}
    				if type(p2) ~= "table" then
    					p2 = { p2 }
    					t2[v2.ArgNames[v3]] = v4
    			table.freeze(t2)
    			local v5 = t._lastVDOM[v1]
    			if v5 and (p1 == v5.type and t._localRefreshActive) then
    				t._DiscardWidget(v5)
    			local v6 = if v5 == nil then t._GenNewWidget(p1, t2, p3, v1) else v5
    			local parentWidget = v6.parentWidget
    			if v6.type ~= "Window" and v6.type ~= "Tooltip" then
    				if v6.ZIndex ~= parentWidget.ZOffset then
    					parentWidget.ZUpdate = true
    				if parentWidget.ZUpdate then
    					v6.ZIndex = parentWidget.ZOffset
    					if v6.Instance then
    						v6.Instance.ZIndex = v6.ZIndex
    						v6.Instance.LayoutOrder = v6.ZIndex
    			if t._deepCompare(v6.providedArguments, t2) == false then
    				v6.arguments = t._deepCopy(t2)
    				v6.providedArguments = t2
    				v2.Update(v6)
    			v6.lastCycleTick = t._cycleTick
    			parentWidget.ZOffset = parentWidget.ZOffset + 1
    			if v2.hasChildren then
    				v6.ZOffset = 0
    				v6.ZUpdate = false
    				local v7 = t
    				v7._stackIndex = v7._stackIndex + 1
    				t._IDStack[t._stackIndex] = v6.ID
    			t._VDOM[v1] = v6
    			t._lastWidget = v6
    	function t._GenNewWidget(p1, p2, p3, p4) --[[ _GenNewWidget | Line: 502 | Upvalues: t (copy), HttpService (ref) ]]
    		local v1 = t._IDStack[t._stackIndex]
    		local v2 = t._VDOM[v1]
    		local v3 = t._widgets[p1]
    		local t2 = {}
    		setmetatable(t2, t2)
    		t2.ID = p4
    		t2.type = p1
    		t2.parentWidget = v2
    		t2.trackedEvents = {}
    		t2.UID = HttpService:GenerateGUID(false):sub(0, 8)
    		t2.ZIndex = v2.ZOffset
    		t2.Instance = v3.Generate(t2)
    		local parentWidget = t2.parentWidget
    		if t._config.Parent then
    			t2.Instance.Parent = t._config.Parent
    			t2.Instance.Parent = t._widgets[parentWidget.type].ChildAdded(parentWidget, t2)
    		t2.providedArguments = p2
    		t2.arguments = t._deepCopy(p2)
    		v3.Update(t2)
    		if v3.hasState then
    				for v5, v6 in p3 do
    					if type(v6) ~= "table" or getmetatable(v6) ~= t.StateClass then
    						p3[v5] = t._widgetState(t2, v5, v6)
    				t2.state = p3
    				for v7, v8 in p3 do
    					v8.ConnectedWidgets[t2.ID] = t2
    				t2.state = {}
    			v3.GenerateState(t2)
    			v3.UpdateState(t2)
    			t2.stateMT = {}
    			setmetatable(t2.state, t2.stateMT)
    			t2.__index = t2.state
    			v4 = t2.stateMT
    		function v4.__index(p1, p2) --[[ Line: 566 | Upvalues: t (ref), t2 (copy) ]]
    			return function() --[[ Line: 567 | Upvalues: t (ref), t2 (ref), p2 (copy) ]]
    				return t._EventCall(t2, p2)
    	function t._ContinueWidget(p1, p2) --[[ _ContinueWidget | Line: 585 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		local v2 = t._VDOM[p1]
    		if t._widgets[p2].hasChildren then
    			local v3 = t
    			v3._stackIndex = v3._stackIndex + 1
    			t._IDStack[t._stackIndex] = v2.ID
    		t._lastWidget = v2
    	function t._DiscardWidget(p1) --[[ _DiscardWidget | Line: 608 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		local parentWidget = p1.parentWidget
    		if parentWidget then
    			t._widgets[parentWidget.type].ChildDiscarded(parentWidget, p1)
    		t._widgets[p1.type].Discard(p1)
    		p1.lastCycleTick = -1
    	function t._widgetState(p1, p2, p3) --[[ _widgetState | Line: 633 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		local v1 = p1.ID .. p2
    		if t._states[v1] then
    			t._states[v1].ConnectedWidgets[p1.ID] = p1
    			t._states[v1] = {
    				value = p3,
    				ConnectedWidgets = {
    					[p1.ID] = p1
    				},
    				ConnectedFunctions = {}
    			}
    			setmetatable(t._states[v1], t.StateClass)
    		return t._states[v1]
    	function t._EventCall(p1, p2) --[[ _EventCall | Line: 659 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		local v1 = t._widgets[p1.type].Events[p2]
    		assert(v1 ~= nil, (("widget %* has no event of name %*"):format(p1.type, p2)))
    		if p1.trackedEvents[p2] == nil then
    			v1.Init(p1)
    			p1.trackedEvents[p2] = true
    		return v1.Get(p1)
    	function t._GetParentWidget() --[[ _GetParentWidget | Line: 678 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		return t._VDOM[t._IDStack[t._stackIndex]]
    	function t._generateEmptyVDOM() --[[ _generateEmptyVDOM | Line: 691 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		return {
    			R = t._rootWidget
    		}
    	function t._generateRootInstance() --[[ _generateRootInstance | Line: 704 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		t._rootInstance = t._widgets.Root.Generate(t._widgets.Root)
    		t._rootInstance.Parent = t.parentInstance
    		t._rootWidget.Instance = t._rootInstance
    	function t._generateSelectionImageObject() --[[ _generateSelectionImageObject | Line: 718 | Upvalues: t (copy) ]]
    		if t.SelectionImageObject then
    			t.SelectionImageObject:Destroy()
    		local Frame = Instance.new("Frame")
